per_outcome.operationalization: Binary indicator of whether the property sold within 3 months of listing, measured from transaction records
Natural logarithm of (1 + days on market) for seller transactions, measured from listing to sale date
Natural logarithm of (1 + days on market) for buyer transactions, measured from search start to purchase
Natural logarithm of final transaction price in RMB from completed sales records
Post-transaction 5-point overall rating of agent service quality provided by buyers
Post-transaction 5-point overall rating of agent service quality provided by sellers
Binary structured feedback label indicating whether agent provided accurate property recommendations
Continuous structured feedback measure of communication inefficiency in agent-client conversations
Continuous structured feedback measure of client comfort during agent conversations
Continuous structured feedback measure of client-perceived trustworthiness of the agent
Count of on-site property viewings arranged, measured from scheduling records
Natural logarithm of initial listing price in RMB when property first posted
Binary structured feedback label indicating whether the pricing strategy was optimal
Binary structured feedback label indicating accuracy of property selling-point descriptions
Weekly count of price adjustment actions taken by sellers, measured from listing modification logs
Average magnitude of price changes across all adjustments, measured in continuous units
